gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (163/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (163/ 8)
text: كَانَ نُوحٌ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ ذَلِكَ إِذَا أَصْبَحَ فَسُمِّيَ بِذَلِكَ عَبْداً شَكُوراً
وَ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَنْ صَدَقَ اللَّهَ نَجَا .

en.hubeali: Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hafs Bin Al Bakhtary,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Nuh<sup>as</sup> was saying that (in the above Hadeeth) whenever it was morning, so he<sup>as</sup> was Named due to that as a grateful servant’.
And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Whoever Ratifies Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is Rescued’.
en.sarwar: 29. Ibn abu ‘Umayr has narrated from Hafs ibn al-Bakhtari from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Noah would say the prayer in the previous Hadith every morning and for that reason he is called a thankful person.’ The Imam said, ‘The Messenger of Allah has said, “Whoever accepts the truth from Allah, gains his salvation.”’”
